speaker: MATT
raw_text: Perfect. Now meticulously, carefully placed to not waste anyone's time. At that moment, you all, noticing this moment of tension, there's a flash from Caleb's hands. Figures, their eyes dart in his direction as he finishes releasing his arms and firing out of the actual deck of the ship, you see a 20-foot tall high wall of roaring flame and fire burn around in a U-shape encompassing the exterior. You can feel the heat on you, but it's not so intense as to hurt. However, I need you to roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know how I would make it go on an angle without causing problems.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We'll just assume it covers that, right? Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, best you can.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Best I can.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh sweet Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you're creating a U?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is that possible?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, this isn't what I imagined in my head, but we are standing where we are standing, so I'm going with what I see.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I dig it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I want that to go like that, but it's not going.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The whole show is just this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is it. This is the entire thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my lord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's actually really cool looking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would like the last one to be on this gentleman.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. We'll place it here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Leaving room to get to this gangway, but he's burning and that's going like this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll say that he is currently--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ablaze.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Facing this to there, also allowing access to both the gangplanks-- (clattering, laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That was the best thing that could have happened!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Meticulous placement be damned.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Someone's getting Velcro in their stocking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I can't make them stick, man!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's fine. Liam, leave it. Leave it alone! You've lost miniature privileges.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He was there too. He was there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the final moment-- we lost one of them up top, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fucking real D&D, people. It went better in rehearsal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure. That'll do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We all know-- I'm not going to touch it-- the gangplanks are open.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We lost a guy on top. Wasn't there a guy on top?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He's right here behind Avantika.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's right. He's just out of your line of sight.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Mm-hmm. 17 for Bouldergut. To the guy it got put on directly, that's a failure on his point. He takes a full 17 points of damage. The guy who's guarding the other plank there, that's a failure on him. He takes 17. Avantika fails with a natural one. Avantika takes a full 17. Then we have the guy over there. He fails with a three. He takes another 17. Then Vera rolls a natural 20. Vera's right there. Vera takes eight. Now that the Wall of Fire is in place, crackling around you, blackening the surface of the deck, the roaring of its sound as it (whooshing), roll initiative, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He was there too. He was there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the final moment-- we lost one of them up top, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fucking real D&D, people. It went better in rehearsal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure. That'll do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We all know-- I'm not going to touch it-- the gangplanks are open.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We lost a guy on top. Wasn't there a guy on top?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He's right here behind Avantika.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's right. He's just out of your line of sight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perfect. Now meticulously, carefully placed to not waste anyone's time. At that moment, you all, noticing this moment of tension, there's a flash from Caleb's hands. Figures, their eyes dart in his direction as he finishes releasing his arms and firing out of the actual deck of the ship, you see a 20-foot tall high wall of roaring flame and fire burn around in a U-shape encompassing the exterior. You can feel the heat on you, but it's not so intense as to hurt. However, I need you to roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a ten-foot reach on the outside of this thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. That's 5d8 fire damage, if you don't mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: On the burn side?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: On the outside. I choose the side, so clearly I'm not going to burn us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anyone within ten feet of the outside gets 5d8?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's fucking rad. Kill some bitches.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know why I didn't expect it to be that amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Shit! Bad rolls. 17 total.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's fine. That's a good start.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a success for the dwarf over there. He takes--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A one, a two, and a three were the first three rolls.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a shame. Eight damage for him. For Bouldergut, that is a failure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Also to toss out  the flames are opaque, so they cannot be seen through.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. It's a 4th-level spell, so I need you to roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I can see your pulse in your neck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can you? I'm dying! I might be having a heart attack! Beau reaches around, and scuffles around to Caleb and goes: Give me the notebook! I'm sticking with the plan!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you going to grab it from him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! I'm going to grab it from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. It's wedged into my belt. Yeah, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Then I look at Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: This is the most precarious Operation game ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Isn't it, though? That's fine. That'll work.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can't hold a movement, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. Only an action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Was taking the book an action?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say running up to him and then going, "Give me the book," him rummaging through it or you helping him rummage through and grab it? I'll consider that an action because that takes a few seconds to do. It's not something he had ready. You've moved 15 feet to get over there and then your action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How far away is Jester from me now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jester was right next to you when you started.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I run back to Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's another 15 feet. That's 30 foot of your movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I say  Let's get out of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's my turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That finishes Beau's go. Avantika's up next.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I could have done Patient Defense! I should have done it!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She can't see in here, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She cannot see, but what she can do is Control Water.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Seeing this flames happen, she (groans), pulls back, closes her eyes for a second, and raises her scarred hand where the sphere that she unlocked Uk'otoa with raised up. At that point, the water from the ocean begins to rise--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Counterspell.
